calendar.matters:
Notice O Hearing Of Petition For Removal Of Untimely Recorded Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Oct-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANN RANKIN, TEL. NO. 1-510-653-8886 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER 2614 BUCHANAN STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Hearing Of Petition For Removal Of Untimely Recorded Mechanics Lien is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Miles R. Lendway, CSR # 13684 =302/hk
